content_body: Thank you for allowing us to rent out your beautiful cabin for the weekend! This is our second year in a row and we are looking forward to the third time in 2020. The weather was PERFECT for nice talks and girl time on the patio. We bonded, laughed, cried, and danced! The house is always so beautiful, warm, clean, and inviting! Thank you!
title: Looking Forward to Our Third Trip in 2020!
